name: motor_driver_hbridge_fixture_v1
description: Starter proof-pack manifest for the H-bridge motor driver board-family benchmark fixture.

checks.name: requirements-present
checks.description: Requirements contract exists for the H-bridge motor driver board-family fixture.

checks.name: golden-kicad-present
checks.description: Golden KiCad fixture files are present and hashable.

checks.name: manufacturing-export-manifest-present

check_records.name: fixture-coverage
check_records.summary: Required starter fixture artifacts are committed for motor_driver_hbridge. This is coverage evidence only.

author: ZapTrace Core Team
limitations: Starter fixture coverage does not prove motor safety, thermal robustness, current rating adequacy, EMC, electrical correctness, or manufacturability.
KiCad files in this fixture are hash fixtures for release workflow coverage, not a fabrication-ready board.
